N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Encrypts credentials stored in workflows. Set once and never change.

N8N_PORT.description: Port n8n listens on (default: 5678, Railway auto-assigns)

GENERIC_TIMEZONE.description: Timezone for schedule-triggered nodes, e.g. America/New_York

N8N_BASIC_AUTH_ACTIVE.description: Enable HTTP basic auth on the n8n UI
